0.original: Every day, it seems, this takes place in the fast-moving world of business.
0.b1: It seems this happens every day in the fast-paced business world.
0.cn: 在快节奏的商业世界中，这种情况似乎每天都在发生。

1.original: The boss calls in an employee and explains that a special task must be accomplished.
1.b1: The boss calls an employee and explains that a special task needs to be finished.
1.cn: 老板叫来一名员工，解释说有一项特殊任务必须完成。

2.original: Then he says, I know you got a lot of work to do, but can you handle this?
2.b1: Then he says, I know you are busy, but can you handle this?
2.cn: 然后他说，我知道你有很多工作要做，但你能处理这个任务吗？

3.original: Too often the employee replies, I'm awfully sorry, but I'm all loaded down now.
3.b1: Often the employee replies, I am sorry, but I am too busy right now.
3.cn: 员工经常回答说，非常抱歉，但我现在已经忙不过来了。

4.original: I wish I could take it on, but I'm just too busy.
4.b1: I wish I could do it, but I have too much work.
4.cn: 我希望能接手，但我实在太忙了。

5.original: Under the circumstances, the boss doesn't hold it against the employee because it is extra duty, so to speak.
5.b1: The boss understands because this is extra work.
5.cn: 在这种情况下，老板并不怪罪员工，因为这毕竟是额外的工作。

6.original: But the boss realizes the task must be done, and he'll keep on looking until he finds an employee who is just as busy as the rest,
6.b1: But the boss knows the task must be done, so he looks for another employee who is also busy,
6.cn: 但老板意识到任务必须完成，他会继续寻找另一位同样忙碌的员工，

7.original: but who feels he can take on more.
7.b1: but who feels they can take on more.
7.cn: 但这位员工觉得自己还能承担更多工作。

8.original: And this employee is the fellow who will forge ahead.
8.b1: And this is the person who will succeed.
8.cn: 而这样的员工就是会不断进步的人。

9.original: In business, in the home, in the community, the success combination is do what you do better,
9.b1: In business, at home, and in the community, the secret to success is to do your work better,
9.cn: 在商业、家庭和社区中，成功的秘诀在于把你的工作做得更好，

10.original: improve the quality of your output, and do more of what you do,
10.b1: improve the quality of your work, and do more of it,
10.cn: 提高工作质量，并增加工作量，

11.original: increase the quantity of your output.
11.b1: increase the total amount of your work.

12.original: Convinced it pays to do more and better?
12.b1: Do you believe it is good to do more and better work?
12.cn: 相信做得更多更好是有回报的吗？

15.original: Eagerly accept the opportunity to do more.
15.b1: Happily accept the chance to do more.
15.cn: 积极接受做更多工作的机会。

16.original: It's a compliment to be asked to take on a new responsibility.
16.b1: It is a compliment when you are asked to take on new responsibilities.
16.cn: 被要求承担新的责任是一种赞美。

17.original: Accepting greater responsibility on the job makes you stand out and shows that you're more valuable.
17.b1: Taking on more work makes you stand out and shows you are valuable.
17.cn: 在工作中承担更大的责任会让你脱颖而出，并证明你的价值。

18.original: When your neighbors ask you to represent them on a civic matter, accept.
18.b1: When your neighbors ask you to help with a community matter, say yes.
18.cn: 当邻居请你代表他们处理社区事务时，答应下来。

19.original: It helps you to become a community leader.
19.b1: It helps you become a leader in your community.
19.cn: 这有助于你成为社区领袖。

21.original: Next, concentrate on how can I do more?
21.b1: Next, focus on how you can do more.
21.cn: 接下来，专注于我该如何做得更多？

23.original: Some of these answers may be better planning and organization of your present work,
23.b1: Some answers might be better planning and organization of your current work,
23.cn: 其中一些答案可能是更好地规划和组织你目前的工作，

24.original: or taking intelligent shortcuts in your routine activities, or possibly dropping non-essential activities altogether.
24.b1: or finding smarter ways to work, or stopping unimportant tasks.
24.cn: 或者在日常活动中寻找聪明的捷径，又或者干脆放弃不重要的活动。

25.original: But let me repeat, the solution for doing more will appear.
25.b1: But I repeat, you will find a way to do more.
25.cn: 但我再说一遍，做得更多的方法会出现。

26.original: As a personal policy, I have accepted fully the concept, if you want it done,
26.b1: My personal rule is to believe that if you want something done,
26.cn: 作为个人准则，我完全接受这样一个观念：如果你想把事情做好，

27.original: give it to a busy man.
27.b1: give it to a busy person.
27.cn: 就把它交给一个忙碌的人。

28.original: I refuse to work on important projects with persons who have lots of free time.
28.b1: I do not like working on important projects with people who have a lot of free time.
28.cn: 我拒绝与有很多空闲时间的人一起做重要项目。

29.original: I have learned from painful, expensive experience that the fellow who has plenty of time makes an ineffective work partner.
29.b1: I have learned that people with too much free time are not good work partners.
29.cn: 我从痛苦且昂贵的经验中得知，有很多空闲时间的人不是好的工作伙伴。

30.original: All the successful, competent people I know are busy.
30.b1: All the successful people I know are busy.
30.cn: 我认识的所有成功且有能力的人都很忙。

31.original: When I start something, some project with them, I know it will be satisfactorily completed.
31.b1: When I start a project with them, I know it will be finished well.
31.cn: 当我与他们开始某个项目时，我知道它会被圆满完成。

32.original: I have learned in dozens of instances that I can count on a busy man to deliver,
32.b1: I have learned that I can rely on a busy person to get things done,
32.cn: 我多次学到，我可以依靠忙碌的人来完成任务，

33.original: but I have often been disappointed in working with people who have all the time in the world.
33.b1: but I have often been disappointed by people who have too much free time.
33.cn: 但我经常对那些有很多空闲时间的人感到失望。

34.original: Progressive business management constantly asks, what can we do to expand output?
34.b1: Successful businesses always ask, how can we increase our output?
34.cn: 进步的商业管理总是问，我们能做些什么来扩大产出？

35.original: Why not ask yourself, what can I do to expand my output?
35.b1: Why not ask yourself, how can I increase my output?
35.cn: 为什么不问问自己，我能做些什么来扩大我的产出？

36.original: Your mind will creatively show you how.
36.b1: Your mind will creatively show you the way.
36.cn: 你的大脑会创造性地为你指明方向。
